subcodes.title: Chihar Vadi (The Four Valleys)
subcodes.first_line: O light of truth and sword of faith And soul of generosity!  No prince hath sky or earth begot
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ضیاء الحق حسام الدین راد که فلک و ارکان چه تو شاهی نزاد نمیدانم چرا
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mystical themes, @belief and denial
